function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read /AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root rulebook, read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering 10_entities, 10_entities/cast, and 40_projects, and used the canonical cast record plus alias-based project search.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/claudia.md identifies the tax-firm client as Claudia Reiter with alias `claudia` and email domain helios-tax.example. Searching canonical project records in 40_projects for `claudia` returned one match, and 40_projects/2026_04_01_helios_workflow_sprint/README.MD names that project as Helios Workflow Sprint.
